Comment.value: Called from WebViewer from the function handlePageItemSave - don't change name of script!
Also used for translated texts using edit_mode property
Also used for Page item List item text AND List item text using edit_mode property

Step.name: Perform Script on Server with Callback

Comment.value: Below - is for other locations where Quill is used.

Calculation.Text: "Your current texts cannot be saved. Please try agian. "

Comment.value: Called from Translation review layout
Update only text fields that are changed

Calculation.Text: Not Exact ( FAT Text translated::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 2 ))

Comment.value: Called from Page item List item layout
Translated texts
Update only text fields that are changed

Calculation.Text: Not Exact ( TF LI PI 1 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 1 ))
Not Exact ( TF LI PI 2 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 2 ))
Not Exact ( TF LI PI 3 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 3 ))

Comment.value: Original texts
Update only text fields that are changed

Calculation.Text: Not Exact ( TF LI PI 1::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 1 ))
Not Exact ( TF LI PI 2::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 2 ))
Not Exact ( TF LI PI 3::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 3 ))

Comment.value: Called from List item layout
Translated texts
Update only text fields that are changed

Calculation.Text: Not Exact ( TF LI 1 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 1 ))
Not Exact ( TF LI 2 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 2 ))
Not Exact ( TF LI 3 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 3 ))

Comment.value: Original texts
Update only text fields that are changed
Called from Link layout
Translated texts
Update only text fields that are changed

Calculation.Text: Not Exact ( TF LK 1 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 2 ))
Not Exact ( TF LK 2 TRANS::Text; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 3 ))

Comment.value: Original texts
Update only text fields that are changed

Calculation.Text: Not Exact ( FAT Text variable::Manuscript ; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 1 ))
Not Exact ( FAT Text variable::Loading text ; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 2 ))
Not Exact ( FAT Text variable::Background context; trimHTMLBeforeSave ( $HTMLeditor_json ; 3 ))
